You just being too stubborn to admit defeat? 'Riki: Riki not stubborn! Reyn nasty Hom Hom!' 'Reyn: Oi, calm down, Riki. I'm sorry. We've been dragging you around getting in all sorts of trouble. I kinda feel a little guilty. That’s all. 'Riki:' Reyn worried for Riki? Riki love to travel with friends! No regrets! Riki not like every day, but tomorrow always different! 'Reyn:' You know who's next though? Dickson. He's not going down easily. Things might get messy, Riki. You ready for that? 'Cos if not, get running, fuzzball! 'Riki:' Riki ready like Reyn ready. Dickson fall like leaf from tree! 'Reyn:' That's not what I meant. Think about your family, Riki. What happens if you get hurt? Your family will have no dad. 'Riki:' Reyn talk funny to Riki. Reyn sound different than before... Riki think that sky will fall on friends' heads next! 'Reyn:' What's got into you? I talk like this all the time. I know about this stuff. I lost my mum and dad ages ago. I was young like your kids. So I know how they'd feel. Make sure you survive, Riki. 'Riki:' Yes, yes, Reyn. Riki understand Reyn's words. Heropon Riki will not fail! Because... 'Reyn:' 'Riki is Heropon!' Heard it all before, man. 'Riki:' Reyn right! Good memory, Reyn!

h2hOutcomes.title: Dialogue
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: 'Nene:' Brothersisterpon... Hope they not giving Mamapon too much troublebuckets... 'Shulk:' Nene, there you are. 'Nene:' Something the matter? 'Shulk:' Kino's been looking for you. Something about stubbing his toe... 'Nene:' Littlepon never change... Nene will rub back later and go 'there there'. 'Shulk:' Ha ha, you're a good sister, Nene. Or maybe more like a mum? 'Shulk:' By the way, what were you doing out here, Nene? 'Nene:' Nene been reminiscing. About Frontier Village, tiny bit. 'Shulk:' I see... So, that's where you were living before? 'Nene:' Yep! In past, Nene always adventure into Makna Forest with brothersisterpon and climb trees every day! 'Shulk:' I assume... you were the responsible one, then? 'Nene:' That silly question! Nopon boys all good-for-nothing lazybones. 'Nene:' It all too much for Mamapon to handle, so Nene have to help take care of brothersisterpon and Dadapon awful lot. 'Shulk:' Ha ha, I wonder what Riki would have to say to that! 'Nene:' Dadapon? After he chosen for village Heropon, and set off on great adventure with Mister Shulk... 'Nene:' house become total pigsty, hungry littlepon underfoot everywhere. 'Shulk:' Wow, I had no idea... 'Shulk:' Hm? Wait, was this after Riki joined us? 'Shulk:' So that must mean... 'Nene:' Yep! Before Nene become friends with Mister Shulk and friends here... 'Nene:' we actually meet one year ago, back in Frontier Village. (flashback) Nopon: Dadapon! Stomach rumbly-rumbly! 'Nene:' Dadapon! Need food! Nopon: Dadapon! Give grub! (end) 'Shulk:' You're kidding! 'Shulk:' I'm sorry! I feel kind of bad about this now! 'Shulk:' Though, in my defence, you've really grown. It's almost like you're a whole different Nopon... 'Nene:' In Nopon biology, age between ten and fifteen often experience growth spurt. 'Nene:' That why, when compare Nene now and Nene one year go, it not too surprising if not realise they the same person. 'Shulk:' It's still quite a surprise... 'Shulk:' I never knew that a Nopon could grow that much in a single year. 'Nene:' Oho-ho! Now Mister Shulk can rely on post-growth-spurt Nene more than ever! 'Shulk:' Ha ha! We can always count on Nopon. Us Homs could learn a lot from you! 'Nene:' But... Nene have these moments lately... when get teeny bit lonely... 'Shulk:' Hm? 'Nene:' Ah! Poor Hom Hom! Mister Shulk such chowhound! 'Shulk:' Eh? I don't think that was me... 'Nene:' Nene prepare some grub tooth-sweet! 'Nene:' Now, now! Mister Shulk, go call Kino and Miss Melia and tell to wash up! 'Shulk:' Really, that's- 'Shulk:' Hmm... 'Shulk:' ''We thought she was so grown up for always taking care of Kino, but really she's just a kid... 'Shulk:' No wonder she's lonely. 'Nene:' Mister Shulk, something happen? 'Nene:' Tummy too rumbly to move, or what? 'Shulk: Wait, I've got it! 'Nene:' Meh-meh! 'Shulk:' I'll round up all the others. Then after, we can all chip in with the meal! 'Shulk:' It'll be more fun that way! 'Nene:' Mister Shulk... 'Nene:' Would not say no!

h2hOutcomes.title: Dialogue
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: 'Melia:' These flowers... Don't they smell heavenly? 'Nene:' Miss Melia is big fan of flowers? 'Melia:' Yes, because of my mother. 'Melia:' When I was young, she often asked for my help with the villa's flower beds. 'Melia:' How about you, Nene? 'Nene:' Nene also love flowers very much! 'Melia:' I see! Then we have something in common. 'Melia:' Before, when I spoke of them to a Homs friends, she said flowers are nice, but nothing beats a warm dinner. I got no understanding from her... 'Melia:' Finally fate sent me someone I can communicate with. 'Nene:' What Miss Melia say about dinner? 'Melia:' Oh, just...talking to myself. The dinner part wasn't really relevant. 'Nene:' But Nene big fan of dinner too! 'Nene:' Most of all, pollen orbs from factory in Frontier Village! They soooo very soft and soooo yummy-scrummy! 'Melia:' Look, that's not- 'Melia:' ...Hold on. 'Nene:' Meh-meh? 'Melia:' When you said...you 'love' flowers, did you mean as a foodstuff? 'Nene:' Meh? There is meaning...other than? 'Melia:' Gah... I should have known... You're one of them... 'Melia:' Nene, listen. 'Melia:' Flowers are not simply special because they can be eaten. 'Melia:' We can admire their beauty, or use them to create ornaments and works of art, and that is a great part of their charm. 'Nene:' Or-na-ments...? 'Nene:' Meh-meh! Oh yes, Nene remember long ago Dadapon make Mamapon flower crown for give as gift! 'Melia:' Riki did that...? That Nopon has hidden depths... 'Melia:' Ahem! In any case. 'Melia:' I would like it if you also had an interest in inedible flowers. 'Melia:' If you did, then you too, just like your mother in her own day, may know the joy she felt. 'Nene:' OK, then next time Nene find flowers that cannot eat, Nene will make pretty flower crown for Miss Melia! 'Melia:' Huh? 'Nene:' To eyes of Nene, Miss Melia look most bestest in blue, what think? 'Melia:' While I appreciate the offer greatly... 'Melia:' Weren't you...originally of the 'regarding flowers as food' persuasion? 'Nene:' Meh? If you make pollen orbs from not-eatable flowers, they bitter and not tasty. 'Melia:' Y-yes, a fair point... It is just as you say... 'Melia:' ''So Nopon see different but equal value in flowers depending on whether they're edible... 'Melia:' Maybe it was foolish in the first place to try and choose only one while discounting the other. 'Melia:' Well then, I will humbly accept the sign of your affection. 'Nene:' Nene roger that! 'Melia: And yet, why do it for me? Won't Kino and Shulk feel left out? 'Nene:' There is very good reason! 'Nene:' Nene just want to see smiling face of Miss Melia, bright as sun rays! 'Melia:' Oh my... 'Nene:' Meh-meh? Something wrong? 'Nene:' Nene...not say anything weird? 'Melia:' ...No, not at all. 'Melia:' It was just how sincerely you said it... I should take a leaf out of your book. 'Nene:' Meh? 'Melia:' Precious Nene, I look forward to the gift. 'Nene:' Nene pull out all stops. 'Melia:' Although...I would feel a bit awkward were I the only one to wear one. 'Melia:' Why don't we make them together and exchange them afterwards? 'Nene:' Meh-meh! That sound wondermarvelivious! 'Nene:' Is deal! No, in fact, is unbreakable promise! 'Melia:' Yes, naturally.

h2hOutcomes.title: Dialogue
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: 'Kino:' So high up! 'Shulk:' It really is, isn't it? 'Kino:' When stand on tippy-edge, head go dizzy-whirl! 'Shulk:' Kino, don't get too close to the edge. If you lose your footing, you could fall! 'Kino:' Here is much safer! 'Kino:' Strange view, when come to think about! Clouds look like floaty-fluff below feet! 'Shulk:' You're right. I don't think I've ever been this high up before, either. 'Kino:' Meh-meh-meh! One moment! 'Kino:' If clouds are in direction down, this continent floating even higher up than clouds?! 'Shulk:' Exactly. It's floating much higher up than Frontier Village in Makna Forest, or even Eryth Sea. 'Kino:' Strange! So strange! But why this island is floating higher than even clouds? 'Shulk:' I think...I remember something from an old book. 'Shulk:' As I recall, the Bionis' Shoulder was once inhabited by the Giants, a highly advanced race. 'Shulk:' There used to be many islands floating above Eryth Sea, you know. 'Kino:' Kino know! Teeny-tiny islands, floating in sky. Very fantastic view! 'Shulk:' The Giants... They could process and utilise Hover Stone, a mineral with floating properties. 'Kino:' Meh-meh-meh! That amazing! In Eryth Sea, they gather so much Hover Stone, it lift up whole continent? 'Shulk:' Actually, you might have it backwards. Maybe they took Hover Stone from here, and transported it back to Eryth Sea. 'Kino:' Oh, elementary! Kino, two-hundred twenty percent agree! 'Shulk:' Of course, it's best to take all this with a grain of salt. 'Kino:' Meh? 'Shulk:' Until now, no Homs, or even High Entia, have set foot on this continent. 'Shulk:' That's why the book's author might only be speculating about some aspects. 'Kino:' No no, it makes sense! Can be no mistake in theory of Shulk! 'Kino:' Shulk really do know everything! Just like Dadapon say! 'Shulk:' Oh no, I'm positive there are things I don't know. 'Kino:' Dadapon say, friends Shulk is brainy-smart, know everything... 'Kino:' and also brave and cool, and can do anything if he put mind to it! 'Shulk:' Di-did he really? 'Shulk:' I'm...actually a little embarrassed now... 'Kino:' Nothing to be embarrass about! Is only good thing! 'Kino:' He also say, Shulk is number-one sidekick of Dadapon! Next in line of awesome! 'Shulk:' Ahaha! I see... 'Shulk:' Heheh... Good old Riki.

h2hOutcomes.title: Dialogue
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: 'Melia:' Ah, Shulk. 'Shulk:' Did something catch your eye? 'Shulk:' Wow... What a view. It's nice to see the capital like this. 'Melia:' Being able to see it from here, it's enough to make me...tense up. 'Melia:' In all honesty, it's making me consider my position and standing. 'Shulk:' I see... 'Melia:' My brethren, who transformed into Telethia back then... 'Melia:' And those who survived, feeling the sadness that seeped into this land... 'Melia:' And then, my father and brother's expectations... Calling me 'the hope of the High Entia'... 'Melia:' I must be an empress worthy of taking on that mantle... But I don't know how... 'Melia:' Much as I hate to admit it... I have no been able to find the right answer yet. 'Shulk:' Melia... 'Melia:' Shulk, you of all people must surely understand? 'Melia:' You, who secured a future for all of us in that decisive battle! 'Shulk:' You know, I've been thinking a lot lately... About what my visions were. 'Melia:' Oh? 'Shulk:' The future that Zanza wanted... That was certainly one of the things I saw. 'Shulk:' But we've fought to deny that future, and in doing so forged our own path. That's part of it too. 'Shulk:' But...now that I can no longer see them, I find myself doubting. 'Shulk:' Were we... Were we really, actually determining our own fate all along...? 'Melia:' Well...it's a good question. 'Melia:' But look, you have saved me more times than I can count! 'Melia:' That did not come about because of your visions! 'Melia:' You used your own judgement, and you chose to act, did you not?! 'Melia:' And thanks to that, I believe I've grown as an individual as well! 'Shulk:' ...Hah! 'Melia:' Wha- I hardly think I said anything funny! 'Shulk:' I'm sorry, you're right. 'Shulk:' I want...my actions to have meaning, too. 'Shulk:' Not to craft Zanza's future... 'Shulk:' Nor defy him and bend the world to a future of our design... 'Shulk:' But to give the freedom to choose to all beings that call this world home. 'Melia:' Freedom to choose, huh...? 'Melia:' What would my father and brother wish for, I wonder... 'Shulk:' I don't think you need mystic visions to work that out. 'Melia:' Hm? 'Shulk:' They'd just want you to be happy. Right? 'Melia:' Ah... 'Melia:' ...Hahah. My gloom is no match for you, Shulk. 'Melia:' It's just as you say. 'Melia:' To become the hope of the High Entia is a fate I choose for myself... 'Melia:' Those were the words Father imparted to me. 'Melia:' There is no need to fear... 'Melia:' That is how my brother encouraged me. 'Melia:' I've been so impatient and homesick, I nearly forgot those most important words... 'Melia:' I can hear Father...lecturing me even now, chiding me for my foolishness. 'Melia:' I give you my thanks, Shulk. 'Shulk:' It's nothing. 'Melia:' To lack clear-cut answers is hardly a sin... 'Melia:' But a sin it would be to cease searching for those answers altogether. 'Melia:' For the High Entia who live on in this land... 'Melia:' Nay, not only the High Entia... 'Melia:' For the sake of all the people of this world, that they may decide the future as equals. That is the vision...I choose to guide me. 'Melia:' That...is the future I wish for. 'Shulk:' Yeah. If anyone can make it happen, it's you. 'Shulk:' But I won't lie to you - the road ahead will be long and arduous. 'Shulk:' I hope...you won't mind me lending a hand? 'Shulk:' After all, that's the future I want too. 'Melia:' Shulk... 'Melia:' Indeed. It'll be my pleasure.

h2hOutcomes.title: Trivia
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: * In earlier versions of the game, the subtitles did not match up with the spoken dialogue.

h2hOutcomes.title: Gallery
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: What were you looking at.jpeg|Incorrect subtitles as seen in-game

h2hOutcomes.title: Dialogue
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: 'Nene:' ...Miss Tyrea seem like difficult sort of person to deal with. 'Melia:' Difficult, huh? Maybe so, but she's still far more mellow than before. 'Nene:' Miss Melia and Miss Tyrea know each other from where? 'Melia:' Well, it's... It's a little complicated to explain. 'Nene:' Complicated how? 'Melia:' Hm... I'm just not quite sure where to begin. 'Melia:' For one, Tyrea and I had never met until one year ago. 'Nene:' Houses too far apart, or...? 'Melia:' I was not allowed to venture outside. Moreover, I never even knew of her existence. 'Melia:' She, on the other hand, seemed to know about me. We, uh... We never met because work had been busy. 'Nene:' But how Miss Melia never know of? If sisters, then of course should know! 'Melia:' That's true. How can I explain this...? 'Melia:' Tyrea and I have separate parents. Different fathers and different mothers, both. 'Nene:' Meh-meh... In same boat as Nene and Kino then? 'Melia:' Just like you and Kino, Tyrea and I are not related by blood. 'Melia:' But, we had a half-brother with whom we shared a parent each. 'Nene:' Half-brother? 'Melia:' Mhm. No parents in common, but a brother we are both related to. 'Melia:' Therefore, Tyrea and I are not exactly complete strangers. 'Nene:' Meh-meh-meh... Brain of Nene starting to melt... 'Melia:' I'm sorry. I did say it's complicated. 'Nene:' Nene just not understand. If both have same brother, why cannot be one family together? 'Melia:' Our parents being different, I and Tyrea have led very different lives. 'Melia:' We never even met, let alone behaved as a family. Neither knows how to relate to each other, and so we struggle on. 'Nene:' It sound like Miss Melia and Miss Tyrea both feeling more like Kino. 'Melia:' How do you mean? 'Nene:' Kino also not talk to anyone at first, very hidey-shy-shy. 'Melia:' I don't think I'd call myself or Tyrea 'shy' exactly... 'Nene:' If want to become good friends, but not know how to put in action, then is exactly same. 'Melia:' Hrm... 'Nene:' But, as can see for self, now Nene and Kino superbest of friends. 'Melia:' Do tell! How did you two achieve that? 'Melia:' Would you teach me the way, please? 'Nene:' Answer is clear as day. Nene prescribe lots of play-play! 'Melia:' ...Play-play? 'Nene:' Also sharing of yummy snacks, and sleep together in same bed. If do that, become family in wink of eye! 'Melia:' I'm not sure I can do that with Tyrea... It seems like a lot... 'Nene:' Meeeeh! Nene patience is exhaust! Miss Melia want to be sisters with Miss Tyrea or not?! 'Melia:' ...Ah, y-yes. I would really like that, I think. 'Nene:' So? Now is best and only chance! No time for hemmings and hawings! 'Melia:' Best and only, hm...? Perhaps you're right. 'Nene:' OK, then now Miss Melia go and say, hey Sisterpon, come play! 'Melia:' R-right now?! I need some time to compose myself! 'Nene:' Ohh, if Miss Melia must. But have to promise to ask soon! 'Melia:' ...Yes, I will. One day very soon.

h2hOutcomes.title: Dialogue
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: 'Kino:' Meh... Meehhh... None here either... Why nowhere has Sweet Wasabi, meh...? 'Nene:' Kino always rant so frequent about Sweet Wasabi, now head of Nene feel like full of Sweet Wasabi... 'Kino:' Meh-meh... Kino desperate... 'Nene:' Kino... 'Nene:' Ah! Nene have good brainwave! 'Kino:' Meh? 'Nene:' Kino! Beloved Sweet Wasabi of Kino... Kino should imaginate it! 'Kino:' Imaginate? 'Nene:' Exact! Love of Kino for Sweet Wasabi be put to test by how well can imaginate inside noggin! 'Kino:' If start imaginate, Kino just get double of hungry... 'Nene:' Is not problemo! If imaginate hard, will be like having Sweet Wasabi right in front of eyes! 'Nene:' From there, Nene have good plan of action. Trust in sisterpon! 'Kino:' Meh-meh! 'Kino:' OK then. Kino will trust. 'Nene:' All right, talk Nene through it. What is shape of Sweet Wasabi? 'Kino:' Meh... Sweet Wasabi is...small-small, thin-long, and also bit lumpy... 'Nene:' And what is colour? 'Kino:' Plantsy... But, to eyes of Kino it also look twinkly-sparkly! 'Nene:' Meh-meh! That the stuff! And then, and then? What smell it smell of? 'Kino:' Meh-meh-meh... Just from remember, Kino drool little bit! 'Nene:' Nene also drooling if be honest... 'Nene:' It almost like, Kino taste Sweet Wasabi, just like it here even though not here! 'Kino:' Meh-meh... 'Kino:' *slurp* Mehh... 'Nene:' OK, next, time to eat imaginated Sweet Wasabit! But but! If just eat, atmosphere not quite right. 'Nene:' Kino play Heropon. And Nene be trusty sidekick who gather Sweet Wasabi as tribute for Heropon. 'Nene:' Nene will give Kino Sweet Wasabi, so Kino can eat and enjoy. 'Kino:' Meh! Kino get it! 'Nene:' Meh-meh... Noble Kino! Behold, is Sweet Wasabi that Nene pick. Please to eat and be hearty! 'Kino:' Meh-meh...! Th-this most delicious experience of eat in life! 'Nene:' Brave Kino, this unworthy sidekick travel all across Bionis! 'Nene:' Ahem... Even had to play tag with Rotbart one time. 'Kino:' Sisterpon, that amazing! 'Nene:' Nene overcome many a scufflescratch to obtain the Sweet Wasabit... 'Nene:' Please to savour mouthfeel! 'Kino:' ...Kino will. 'Kino:' Kino eat every last bit, including stems! 'Kino:' *scarfle, scoff* 'Nene:' ...How is flavour... Heropon Kino? 'Kino:' Mehmehmeh! This...!!! 'Nene:' ...Meh-meh? 'Kino:' ...Kino need few more bits. *snarfle, gobble* 'Nene:' ...gulp... 'Kino:' Meh-meh-MEH! THIS...!!! 'Nene:' ...Me-me-me-meh! 'Kino:' Huh? 'Kino:' This just air! No can have any flavour! 'Nene:' Meh-meh! Kino, lack of imaginating is fault! 'Kino:' Can say what Nene want, no flavour is no flavour...! 'Nene:' Oh brotherpon... 'Kino:' Butbutbut! Kino catch whiff! Smell of tasty morsel! Must be delicious snacklings nearby, Kino bet! 'Nene:' Meh! Kino think so too? Nene just thought hunger was catching! 'Kino:' Mehmeh! Sisterpon is good snuffler! 'Nene:' All right, we go in search of tasty-crumbles! 'Kino:' Meht's-a-go! 'Nene:' Meh!

h2hOutcomes.title: Dialogue
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: 'Kino:' Shulk, lookie-look! Plenty of tree is growing! 'Shulk:' Looks like this area isn't very heavily cultivated. That might be why nature runs rampant. 'Kino:' Big step for Nopon! Kino make this into Frontier Village mark two! 'Shulk:' Frontier Village, huh...? I was amazed first time I saw it. All the pollen factories...built into that giant tree... 'Kino:' Nopon never use metal if can be helped! 'Kino:' Except for sisterpon, who like use Hom Hom shield very much. 'Shulk:' Oh, right. It's true though, Riki never did use a metal weapon. 'Shulk:' It looked more like a fruit of some kind... 'Kino:' Kino hear this is actually gunberry that store ether within. 'Kino:' Kino just make it suck in ether and then it shoot out contents like real rifle. 'Shulk:' Is that right? I'm not sure I've ever seen a berry that big before. 'Kino:' Indeedy! Kino never see one lying around before, that for sure. 'Shulk:' The plants that bear them must be very rare. I knew Biters, but I didn't you had curiosities like these... 'Kino:' Well, Biters still more popular... 'Kino:' Littlepon Kino also want to use Biter, but no beef on wings, so could not carry properly... 'Kino:' But them, when Kino get in big sulk, Dadapon go and pick gunberry from somewhere. 'Shulk:' Riki did? So he can be a model father. I'm impressed. 'Kino:' Yes-yes! Dadapon is true Heropon! 'Kino:' This weapon, only used now by Nopon too wimpy to hold Biter, but Dadapon was first one to discover! 'Kino:' Everyone jump for happy when introduce! 'Shulk:' Riki is a man of many talents, huh? A true Heropon indeed. 'Kino:' Dadapon say, he get idea for making into weapon from Hom Hom gun! 'Shulk:' Inspired by a Homs gun...? Ahh. Sharla's ether rifle, then. 'Shulk:' Though if he was going to make weapons, I would've been happy to help him out... 'Kino:' How about if Shulk give Kino pointers? Kino still not always hit target! 'Shulk:' Pointers, eh? From what I saw, though, it seemed like you knew your stuff. 'Kino:' Kino also think so! But still sometimes miss! 'Shulk:' ...Right. Then maybe...you'd best learn how to properly handle the weapon. 'Kino:' Properly how? 'Shulk:' Hm... Am I right...to assume you've never really had proper training? 'Kino:' Meh-meh, how Shulk knowing of that?! Kino state of shock! 'Shulk:' I reckon...the weapon's more beat up than it should be. You don't want that. More prone to malfunctions. 'Kino:' What Kino should do?! 'Shulk:' It's important to be as careful as possible. 'Shulk:' Handle it too roughly and you could end up warping the grip. 'Shulk:' If the aim is a little off, it could potentially be because of that. 'Kino:' How Shulk know such things?! Kingo never figure out in million years! 'Shulk:' I've always liked tinkering with weapons. Even made my friend Reyn's weapon, in fact. That'll be why. 'Shulk:' If you need a weapon maintained. I'm your guy. 'Kino:' Shulk really second most awesome after Dadapon! Tell Kino more, more, more! 'Shulk:' All right, but for now, let's reinforce this to help your aim. 'Shulk:' In return, could you...perhaps...share some more stories? 'Kino:' Kino like that deal!

prerequisites.label: Nighttime, clear weather, Gran Dell visited

h2hOutcomes.title: Dialogue
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: 'Kino:' *sigh* ...Such very depress... 'Melia:' What is it, Kino? Has something happened? 'Kino:' Ah! Miss Melly! 'Melia:' Why the sighing? It's unlike the bright, bubbly Kino I know. 'Kino:' What, Kino not allowed to be moody?! Is sensitive! Especially at age of now! 'Melia:' I see... Then I hope you'll forgive me. 'Melia:' So, something worrying you? Anything you care to discuss with me? 'Kino:' Doubt if can help... 'Kino:' But maybe Miss Melly have some advice. 'Melia:' Oh! Very well. In that case, I am all ears. 'Kino:' Kino...follow Miss Melly and Shulk all skulky-like to come with. 'Melia:' Hmm... Yes, quite. 'Kino:' But, at start, Kino never think Kino come to such very faraway place... 'Kino:' That why, when Kino leave, Kino not say 'bye-byes' to Mamapon... 'Kino:' If Kino come back now, there sure to be heck to pay! 'Kino:' When Mamapon angry, monster look like chew-toy! Just thought of remember makes mood go kerplunge! 'Melia:' Hm. Did Oka really have such force of character? Don't fret. It's only because she worries about you! 'Melia:' That intensity is nothing but a sign that you are loved dearly, Kino. 'Kino:' Miss Melly sure? 'Melia:' Yes! I'd say...she only scolds you because she cares. 'Kino:' Mamapon get angry...because love? Kino not really understand... 'Melia:' Look at it this way... 'Melia:' Kino, you are her beloved son. If you were hurt, Oka would be sad, would she not? 'Melia:' Therefore, when she scolds you, it's to try and ensure that you don't put yourself in harm's way. 'Melia:' So, do not think it cruelty. 'Kino:' ...Ah! Kino know! 'Kino:' Everything resolve if Miss Melly just ask Mamapon to tone down harsh when angry at Kino! 'Kino:' If do that, even Mamapon may become a bit gentler Nopon! 'Melia:' No, that I cannot do. 'Kino:' Meh-meh! Why no?! 'Melia:' You really need me to explain? 'Melia:' Isn't it the mark of a Heropon to take responsibility for their own actions? 'Melia:' At least I believe Riki did. To an extent... 'Melia:' If you wanted to come with us, you should have asked Riki and Oka's permission to begin with. 'Melia:' Don't you...think that's what a Heropon ought to do? 'Kino:' Meh-meh?! 'Melia:' You'll find as you go through life, similar situations may reoccur. 'Melia:' If they do, and if you act the way you did this time, nobody will acknowledge you as a true Heropon. 'Kino:' Meh-meh-MEH?! 'Kino:' Mi-Miss Melly so stern... 'Kino:' Kino admit defeat. Sneaking onto boat was naughty behaviour. 'Melia:' Hah. 'Melia:' Kino. Once you realise you have done wrong, you must reflect on it, and rectify it as soon as you can. 'Melia:' If you let the chance slip you by, you may not get another... 'Kino:' Kino got it, Miss Melly! 'Kino:' From now, Kino promise to never follow friends all sneaky-skulky again! Will follow friends proudly! 'Melia:' Oh, uhm... It seems...I didn't explain properly after all. 'Melia:' What you did wrong, was to cause Oka undue concern, so you'll have to accept your punishment, put time into self-reflection, and next time, simply do better. 'Melia:' That is the behaviour that will let you grow on your path as a mighty Hero. 'Kino:' Understood! Kino promise! 'Melia:' Mmm... I wonder if he really understood...

h2hOutcomes.title: Dialogue
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: 'Nene:' Err, why Mister Shulk stop so sudden? 'Shulk:' I was just thinking...about the cave near Colony 9. Do you know it, Nene? It's called Tephra Cave. 'Nene:' Nene know place. 'Nene:' Nene tag along once with group of Hom Hom. Went to fetch Ether Cylinders. 'Shulk:' I've done that too sometimes. Went with Reyn a couple of times. 'Nene:' Meh-meh! Hooray for twinsies! Nene went there during rebuilding effort. 'Shulk:' So you did your part to help, Nene? Thanks for that! 'Nene:' It not thing that need thanks per se. Just doing civic duty. 'Nene:' Must stay friends and work together...with all peoples that live in world! 'Shulk:' Haha. That's right. 'Nene:' But... Folk here have lot of angry kerscuffles... Fight between neighbours bad. 'Nene:' Should watch Nene and Kino, learn to everyone play nice. 'Shulk:' Well, I wouldn't say the people here are enemies exactly. They just...don't know how to work out their feelings. 'Nene:' That just...fancy way of saying 'fighting'? 'Shulk:' It's not exactly like fighting... 'Shulk:' Both sides do understand each other, but their paths took them in different directions. 'Nene:' What Mister Shulk mean? 'Shulk:' If the two sides had simply hated each other, they wouldn't just leave; they'd try to drive the other side out by force. 'Shulk:' But that's not what they did. They still have common ground to stand on. 'Shulk:' And, Melia's here now. They just need some time to mull things over. 'Nene:' Mister Shulk is very kind person. Very different from Mamapon... 'Nene:' When Nene and Kino get into bad fight, Mamapon spank first, then ask questions. 'Nene:' Nene and Kino always in tears, but always say sorries and make up with hug-hug. 'Nene:' End of end, friendship become much stronger. Being friends mean whole lot more fun, and more fun is more good. 'Nene:' Also, everyone in Colony 9 was friends from start of start. 'Shulk:' Well, that's because...everyone there was working to help rebuild. We all share the same dream. 'Nene:' But dreams of people here...all really all that different from each other? 'Shulk:' For now, I guess. But Melia's doing the best she can, and we need to as well. 'Nene:' Nene understand. 'Nene:' Nene will wait until Miss Melia make dreams of everyone much together as one. 'Nene:' But...if dream of Miss Melia...not go through to everyone... In that case, Nene will... 'Shulk:' Nene will...? 'Nene:' Nene will give vicious spankings! And no one spared, even not Mister Shulk! 'Shulk:' What, me as well? Haha... Just promise to be gentle!

h2hOutcomes.title: Dialogue
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: 'Kino:' Miss Melly, everything OK? 'Melia:' I was pondering the shape of things that are to come. 'Kino:' Like fuzzy shape of King of Fog thing? 'Melia:' Ha! No, even beyond that... 'Kino:' Meh-meh...? 'Melia:' When this is over, when the battle is won...what will you do? 'Kino:' Hm hm hmm! Miss Melly ask good question! Kino go straight home and report succeedings to Dadapon. 'Melia:' Mm. What will you tell him? 'Kino:' That Miss Melly and others...make bestest sidekicks! 'Melia:' Sidekicks? 'Kino:' Ki-Ki-Kino mean friends! Was slip of tongue! Miss Melly, please no scary-face! 'Melia:' Haha... Just a joke. 'Kino:' Meh meh... Please not to intimidate Kino... 'Melia:' You wish to be a Heropon, yes? If that was enough to startle you, you've got a long way to go. 'Kino:' Meh-meh... 'Melia:' And yet, I hardly think you need to feel hurried. This journey we're on is a certain first step on the way to achieving your dream. 'Melia:' I know you will have many chances to prove yourself yet. 'Melia:' Also... 'Melia:' I think you cut a very fine figure, pursuing your goal. 'Kino:' Oooh, then Kino already mighty Heropon? 'Melia:' Hahah... If you're asking that question, it's a sign you are not. 'Kino:' Miss Melly make no sense sometimes... 'Melia:' What will you do after you speak to Riki? 'Kino:' Meh-meh? What Miss Melly mean? 'Melia:' As laudable as it is to have made new friends, surely it is but the first step to herodom? 'Kino:' Meh-meh! Sideki- Uh, friends, is all Kino thought of so far! 'Kino:' After Dadapon come back from adventure, he boldly-brag about bring back many friends and have great success. 'Kino:' So then, Kino also want to tell about how Kino make friends. That not enough reason to want? 'Melia:' What really counts is inside you. But you still have much time. Perhaps it would do you good to think on it awhile. 'Kino:' Miss Melly not just tell? Miss Melly such meanie! 'Kino:' Also, what is mean by still have much time? 'Kino:' We not go back once King of Fog go splorsh? 'Melia:' You are forgetting something. The Junks is quite severely damaged. I expect we can repair it, but it will not happen overnight. 'Kino:' Mehhh... That did slip mind! 'Kino:' But everyone expect big return of Heropon Kino... What Kino going to do? 'Kino:' Have ambitions! Want to travel to far-far land, talk to many-much people, and lend helping wing if some in distress... 'Kino:' What to doing? What to doing?! Magnificent plan of Kino encounter unplanned delay! 'Kino:' Miss Melly...! Please to helping Kino...! 'Melia:' Haha. I see you've taken my words to heart... 'Kino:' Meh-mehhh! What Miss Melly mean?! 'Melia:' To think it was only a little while ago you were hiding behind Nene. You've come very far in such a short time. 'Melia:' Helping those you encounter, no matter the problem... You've become quite forthright in our travels. 'Melia:' Indeed, striving to make your dreams come true is a powerful thing... 'Kino:' Meh? So Miss Melly explain? 'Melia:' Well... Being told the answers does not equal learning. 'Melia:' How about this... Why don't we think on it together? 'Kino:' Meh-meh! Miss Melly nice to Kino after all!

prerequisites.label: Afternoon, clear weather, Deinos Sauros defeated, Family Relations and Tyrea's Uncertainty viewed.

h2hOutcomes.title: Dialogue
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: 'Melia:' Tyrea, do you perchance remember the day that we two first met? 'Tyrea:' I was wondering what you'd come out with... You've finally decided to settle some past grudges, have you? 'Melia:' Not at all... I just found it quite moving. 'Melia:' Though we crossed blades, contended for our very lives, here we are standing shoulder-to-shoulder, gazing out at our shared ancestral home... 'Tyrea:' Hah... Quite. Getting over all that was...a minor miracle. 'Tyrea:' If someone told me a year ago that we'd be doing this, I'd have carved out their spleen for suggesting it. 'Melia:' Hah... 'Melia:' ...Tyrea. About what I said to you before... 'Tyrea:' ...Yes? 'Melia:' Are your doubts, allayed? 'Tyrea:' Perhaps...not all of them. However, my answer to the question you posed is more or less ready. 'Melia:' ...Tell me, then. 'Tyrea:' Melia... You are the last High Entia of imperial blood. 'Melia:' Well, yes, that is true. Although, are you not also...? 'Tyrea:' Quiet. You must continue the line... You, and none other. 'Melia:' ... 'Tyrea:' You are the light, Melia. You must lead us... Gather our people under your banner. 'Tyrea:' I don't think...I ought to be there for that. 'Melia:' Why, Tyrea? What leads you to say such a thing?! 'Tyrea:' The fact is, I was an Inquisitor of the Bionite Order, my very existence proscribed by law. 'Tyrea:' You know what role the Order played in the imperial family's history. I hardly need to remind you. 'Melia:' Tyrea... 'Tyrea:' Understand! I regret none of the deeds I did for Yumea. 'Tyrea:' But even so... All that I have done in that life...lingers on inside me, a burden I can't escape. 'Tyrea:' All I'd do...is cast a deep shadow...on your radiance. 'Tyrea:' As the imperial line rises to greet a new age, I would contribute nothing. I'd be a hindrance. 'Melia:' How can you...hate your own self that much...? 'Tyrea:' ... 'Melia:' If that is the answer you wish to give me, then it would be wrong for me to speak out against it. 'Melia:' But I will say this, Tyrea. 'Melia:' Imperial blood yet runs in your veins too. 'Melia:' As does the mixed blood of a Homs. We are no different. How could we be? 'Tyrea:' ...At this point, it doesn't mean a damned thing. 'Melia:' You're wrong...! 'Tyrea:' Stop talking! I told you not to get your hopes up. 'Melia:' Can it really be your intention to keep blaming yourself?! Why?! Why won't you turn your eyes to the future?! 'Melia:' Is this what your mother would have wanted? 'Tyrea:' How dare you?! You didn't know Yumea. You didn't know my mother! 'Melia:' ...! 'Nene:' Meh-meeeeh! Two of you, stop flaptraps! 'Melia:' Nene?! Wh-what are you doing here?! 'Nene:' That question very irregardable! Nene simply observe sneaky-like from hiding! 'Nene:' Miss Tyrea, Miss Melia... Sisterpon fight is counterproductive! 'Tyrea:' Whuh...?! 'Nene:' Is better to hug and make up blinkedy-snap. If not, Mamapon roll up sleeves and then everyone sorry! 'Tyrea:' Qu-quit this clowning! We are not- 'Nene:' Incidentally, Nene is older sisterpon, so even in fight with Kino, always make up swifty-quick. 'Nene:' B-but is not because Mamapon scare into submission, OK?! Actually, is what Nene like to call 'mature attitude'! 'Nene:' Ugh... Just thinking about make old scars of Nene itchy-itchy. 'Nene:' B-but anyway, bottom line is fighting is bad! So! Now is when please to hug and make up! Go on... Say 'Sor-ry, Sis-ter-pon'! 'Tyrea:' What is this thing going on about...? 'Melia:' ...Mother, huh? 'Melia:' If your mother... If Yumea were here now, looking at us like this, I wonder what she would say... 'Tyrea:' Hey, don't tell me you're taking it seriously? It's spouting nonsense! 'Nene:' Not 'it'! Nene is not thing! Nene is Nene! 'Tyrea:' ...What point is there in talking about it now? There's no way for us to know. 'Tyrea:' She's dead and gone... 'Melia:' ...My apologies, Tyrea. I know you put great faith in her... So, I just thought... 'Melia:' But it's as you say. I'll admit... I never understood your mother's mind, even at the very end. 'Tyrea:' ... 'Tyrea:' ...Yumea's devotion to the Bionite Order was how she honoured the imperial line. 'Tyrea:' And also...how she channelled her woe over our ultimate fate. 'Tyrea:' Her spirit contained no falsehood. 'Melia:' ...I see. 'Tyrea:' Due to the loftiness of her faith, Yumea could be...very severe, towards both me and herself. 'Tyrea:' ''I'm sure, if she could see me now... 'Tyrea:' ... 'Tyrea:' ...Attending at Yumea's side, serving her unto exhaustion, was my whole life. 'Tyrea:' Yumea's desires were mine as well. What's more, the blood that flows in me is in essence... 'Melia:' ...Tyrea? 'Tyrea:' Yumea's blood, and her will... Are they really doomed to just cease to be...? 'Tyrea:' Would Yumea really... Would Mother simply allow this...? 'Tyrea:' Ah... Hahahaha...! 'Melia:' H-hey, whatever has got into you? 'Tyrea:' Melia... If Yumea were here, if she saw me... Saw us'' two, here's how she'd rebuke us: 'Tyrea:' 'If you wish a future for the High Entia, you must do whatever is in your power!' 'Melia:' Huh...? 'Tyrea:' Changing one's way of life means negating your past self. 'Tyrea:' I tried to change myself... And the path I walked until then, I disavowed. 'Tyrea:' The precious path I had walked as Yumea's loyal retainer... 'Tyrea:' Let me be me, then. The Empress'... Your shadow, and I'll do what's in my power. 'Melia:' So then, you will not change your ways, but still walk alongside me... Is that correct? 'Tyrea:' Yumea - Mother - kept me by her side for that purpose. She already showed me the road that I should take. 'Tyrea:' I think I'd like to repay her...by putting her will into action. For her...and for the future of the High Entia. 'Melia:' I see... So that's the answer you have chosen? ...I'm glad that is your decision, Tyrea. 'Tyrea:' Hmph... You may be a fitting vessel to inherit the throne, but as a politician, you'll be much too soft for your own good. 'Tyrea:' If you got blinded by pretty ideals and came to ruin, I could never face my mother... 'Melia:' No, I'd never be so...! 'Tyrea:' Let's face it. You'll need someone to rein you in when you get too blinkered. 'Melia:' Frankly, I find the suggestion somewhat offensive... 'Melia:' ...All right, but in that case, I must make a pronouncement, too. 'Melia:' I, Melia Antiqua, Empress of the High Entia, by mine name do solemnly decree. 'Melia:' Be thou guardian, for our subjects and the race entire. Act the mistress of unseen shadows, and pledge thy very life to this throne. 'Melia:' Swear your might...to my bidding, Tyrea. 'Tyrea:' ...I accept. I will honour this commission, Your Majesty. 'Melia:' Heh. 'Tyrea:' Hmph... 'Nene:' Miss Tyrea, Nene very proud! Manage to apologise very beautiful! Major sisterpon vibes! 'Tyrea:' Wh-who are you calling sisters?! And I'll have you know, I've nothing to apologise for! 'Nene:' Meh? But, Miss Tyrea! Just did proper big bow to Miss Melia, no? 'Tyrea:' You little... Are you actively trying to insult me? 'Nene:' Meh-meh! But bow had plenty sorryfeel! It just like when Dadapon make apologisings to Mamapon! 'Tyrea:' ...Whatever. I'm too old for this... 'Melia:' The future...is within our grasp, sister mine.

prerequisites.label: Afternoon, clear weather, Deinos Sauros defeated

h2hOutcomes.title: Dialogue
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: 'Nene:' Nice and warm... 'Kino:' Snoozy and dozy... 'Nene:' Sleepsy and sunsy... 'Kino:' Sisterpon... Kino just have dream of become Heropon. 'Nene:' Meh! 'Nene:' ...Big impress, Kino. Even dream of being Heropon in middle of asleep...? 'Kino:' Sisterpon there too. 'Nene:' Nene in dream too? What Nene do? 'Kino:' Mehh... Kino and Nene were lying in sun just like now. 'Kino:' But then, it suddenly get dark. When open eye, saw face of huge Brog in front of own face! 'Nene:' Meh-mehhh! Hope it not eat us! 'Kino:' Tongue of Brog all wormy-long. With tongue, it gobble Nene right up! 'Nene:' Oh no! Nene get ate?! 'Kino:' But but! To help sisterpon, Kino get self ate too! 'Nene:' Meh?! What happen next?! 'Kino:' Inside of Brog stomach full of pollen orbs! 'Nene:' Oh, day of happy! How very lucky to be Brog-food! 'Nene:' No, wait. How we get out?! 'Kino:' Kino and sisterpon ate own fill of pollen orbs! Ate till full! 'Nene:' It sound like dream! 'Kino:' So then, bodies of Kino and Nene swell up like balloon, and then Brog blergh Kino and Nene out! 'Nene:' Such wow! Nene and Kino jammypants! 'Kino:' And that how Kino become mighty Heropon! 'Nene:' ...Such sudden. 'Nene:' Now, what give? Why not Nene become Heropon...? 'Kino:' But but...! 'Nene:' What happen? 'Kino:' It was just dream... Once woke up, no longer was Heropon... 'Nene:' Meh... 'Nene:' ...Well, Nene think, Kino become more closer to Heropon each day. 'Nene:' Kino. While travel with Mister Shulk and Miss Melia, Kino try to talk to all many sorts of people. And also... 'Nene:' Ancient Nopon Art of Shifty-Slap that Kino practice so long look like it come along nicely. 'Kino:' Meh-meh! Really? Hurrah! Kino happy to hear! 'Kino:' ...Meh?! Wait, how Nene know Kino was practising Shifty-Slap technique?! 'Nene:' Meh. Please not to sweat teensy details. 'Kino:' Shifty answer... 'Nene:' A-anyway... Kino working really hard to become Heropon. Which mean... 'Nene:' One day soon, become Heropon in life, not just dream! 'Kino:' Meh... 'Nene:' Mister Shulk and Miss Melia such amazing. Always give everything for others. 'Nene:' They like real-life Heropon... 'Kino:' But... But what about...? 'Kino:' Kino defeat King of Fog! Could even do all by lonesome! 'Nene:' Meh-meh... Kino sure? 'Kino:' Kino sure! 'Nene:' ...But...there no need for Kino to fight by lonesome. 'Nene:' Everyone defeat Fog King together. If fight alone, is always chance of slip up and make mistake. But when all together, help one another to succeed. 'Nene:' Nene make sure everyone stay safe. And Kino make sure everyone stay healthy. 'Kino:' Meh-meh... 'Kino:' Kino convinced... 'Kino:' After beat King of Fog, Kino be Heropon...? 'Nene:' ...For sure get big pat on back from Bird People friends. 'Nene:' And then, maybe they build statue of Kino: 'Heropon, Vanquisher of King of Fog'! 'Kino:' Meh-meh-meh! Kino have to do it! 'Nene:' Nene always by side of Kino. Not have to worry one bit. 'Kino:' Awwww... 'Kino:' Thankings. With Nene by side of Kino, King of Fog just mere cloudypuff! 'Nene:' That the spirit! Nene also set pluck to max!

h2hOutcomes.title: Dialogue
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: 'Tyrea:' ...It's a fateful thing, that you and I should see each other again, here, like this. 'Melia:' Tyrea... What brought you to the Bionis' Shoulder? 'Tyrea:' A good question... Honestly, I had no motive. 'Tyrea:' I wandered without aim, the Bionis no more... Before long, I found myself here. That's all. 'Melia:' ...So it is but a work of chance, is that right? 'Tyrea:' Exactly... Though, I certainly didn't expect... that Chance would bring me back to Alcamoth. 'Tyrea:' The rest is just as I told you. I helped Teelan with his research, and surveilled the city, waiting for the right opportunity. 'Melia:' So then, you're saying you remained here in order to win back the capital, yes? 'Tyrea:' If I'm honest, I have to admit...I did consider it. ...At least until the Fog King appeared. 'Melia:' And then? 'Tyrea:' The people who still live here... When I showed up, I was a dead woman walking, but they took me in without question. 'Tyrea:' People like that...falling victim to that accursed monster...? It doesn't bear thinking about. 'Tyrea:' That's why... 'Melia:' You feel yourself indebted to them, right? Tyrea... You've changed. 'Tyrea:' ...Have I? Have I really? 'Melia:' Tyrea... If it's all right with you, why not come with us? 'Tyrea:' Melia... 'Melia:' We can't pretend the past didn't happen, I know that. But still, can't we at least band together...? 'Tyrea:' I...can't. 'Melia:' ...I-is...that so...? 'Tyrea:' ... 'Melia:' ...Forgive me, Tyrea. It was thoughtless not to consider your feelings. 'Melia:' You must see me...as your mother's killer... 'Tyrea:' You misapprehend. That's not at issue here. 'Tyrea:' ...I just don't...understand. 'Melia:' What do you mean? What don't you understand? 'Tyrea:' I simply... Since the day Yumea drew her final breath, I've lost sight of the path I should walk. It's still the same now. 'Tyrea:' What can I focus on? Where should I go? What will bring meaning to my existence? 'Tyrea:' Even my staying here, when it comes down to it... I'm just resigning myself to the winds of Chance. 'Melia:' Tyrea, that's wrong... 'Tyrea:' Melia, you continue to misjudge me. I have NOT...'changed'. 'Tyrea:' I've never known anything. Not even my own desires. 'Melia:' ...I can tell you feel lost, Tyrea. 'Tyrea:' I've never had anything remotely resembling your brilliance. 'Melia:' Everyone, and I mean everyone, feels doubt. We lost sight of the right path in the great war; we all did, not just you. 'Melia:' I did as well... Nay...I still do now. If I said all my doubts were behind me, it would be a heinous lie. 'Tyrea:' ... 'Melia:' When your heart is lost at sea and drifting, it takes time to find answers within. And when you've lost someone important to you, it takes more time, still... 'Melia:' Hear me. You are strong enough. In time, you will find your answers. 'Tyrea:' ...My skills were once widely recognised. Though I may have used them to try and end your life... 'Melia:' Is that still...something you wish to do? 'Tyrea:' If that were the case, you would have gone sailing over the edge of the Bionis' Shoulder a long time ago. 'Melia:' Mm, I believe so too. When in reality, I'm standing here talking with you. 'Melia:' So then, I think that leaves us some room for friendship...doesn't it? 'Tyrea:' Heh... You speak just like those Homs you travelled with. 'Melia:' I take that as a compliment, actually. But it's as you say. It's yet another thing I've learnt from them. 'Tyrea:' Why are you so damned persistent? Is that your Crown Princess duty? Or do you...simply pity the weakling I've become? 'Melia:' Enough. I'll hear no more of this self-loathing! 'Tyrea:' Ha! 'Melia:' My heart tells me it's the right thing to do. That is all. That is my reason, and the only answer you'll get. 'Tyrea:' Melia... 'Melia:' What's more, Tyrea... You're all the family I have left... 'Tyrea:' ... 'Melia:' Listen. Once we have dealt with the matter at hand, would you please give me your answer again? 'Tyrea:' ...And what if I cannot give you...the answer that you're looking for? 'Melia:' I will respect whatever conclusion you arrive at, so long as it's one you can live with. 'Tyrea:' ...Don't get your hopes up. 'Melia:' Fine. That will suffice for now. I'll be waiting, Tyrea. 'Tyrea:' Should I really go along with Melia...? Am I worthy...? After all the years spent in shadows... All the blood... 'Tyrea:' Yumea... Mother. Please, give me a sign...!

prerequisites.label: Fogbeasts break through Gran Dell's wall

h2hOutcomes.title: Dialogue
h2hOutcomes.dialogue: 'Melia:' Not long now. Father... Brother... With these two hands of mine... I will reclaim Alcamoth! 'Shulk:' Hey, Melia... Are you nervous? 'Melia:' Do not worry, Shulk. I'm just a little heightened. 'Trembling with excitement', as Dunban might say. 'Shulk:' Hahaha, that's good to hear. I suppose it's no great wonder though. 'Melia:' How about yourself? You have been given a big role to play. 'Melia:' Hm... Taking it in your stride, as usual? 'Shulk:' Well... I've been remembering our time on the Bionis' Shoulder. 'Shulk:' It hasn't been easy, but we found the refugees here, got to know Teelan and so on... I'm glad we came. 'Melia:' I see... 'Shulk:' If we can retake the capital, and then...get ourselves back to Colony 9, that'll be us sorted. 'Melia:' ...Sorted, huh...? 'Shulk:' That's right! We're just about there now. We've got this, you know? 'Melia:' Mm... I'm sure. 'Shulk:' ...What's wrong? 'Melia:' Say, Shulk... Tell me, what are your thoughts on the rift? 'Shulk:' Hm? Right, umm... 'Shulk:' Considering everything we've seen so far, we don't really know...all that much about it. 'Shulk:' I've never seen anything like it... The Fog King, I mean... It's alien to the Bionis and Mechonis. 'Melia:' Indeed, the rift is a complete and utter enigma to us. All we know for certain is that its existence poses danger. 'Melia:' A wholly new threat...for a wholly new world. 'Shulk:' ...Sounds ominous. 'Melia:' Are my fears unfounded? 'Shulk:' To be fair, there's a lot about this world that's different... Frankly, it's anyone's guess, right now... 'Melia:' Hm... 'Shulk:' Does it bother you? The rift, I mean. 'Melia:' ...I have an ill premonition. 'Shulk:' Oh? 'Melia:' Disaster... Complete ruin, inescapably looming over our future. 'Melia:' I know not why...but that is the vague dread that I feel...when I consider the rift. 'Shulk:' Hey now... 'Melia:' ...I'm sorry. I know we have a big task ahead. I'll try to keep my chin up. 'Shulk:' ...It's OK. Your misgivings may just be a weird hunch, or for all we know they might come true tomorrow. 'Shulk:' But... There's plenty more we don't know. The future... No one knows it for certain. 'Melia:' ... 'Shulk:' Still, that doesn't mean we're entirely helpless. Our actions - they're what shapes the future. We've proven that, countless times already. 'Shulk:' So I think, we'll get through this. If we stand together, no power in the world can stand against us. 'Melia:' Shulk... 'Melia:' Hah. I swear, you never change. 'Shulk:' Oh, sorry... I guess I might've gone a bit overboard. 'Melia:' No, I don't think that's possible. I think your words have hit the mark exactly. 'Melia:' The future is ours, and it is decided here. All we can do, is give our all to build a better one. 'Melia:' ...Indeed, whatever awaits ahead. 'Melia:' I seem to be in your debt again. You keep doing this, always helping me when I'm down. 'Shulk:' Haha, I didn't really do anything though. I'm just happy I could lift you up. 'Melia:' My thanks. All right then, we have crucial work to do. 'Shulk:' Defeat the Fog King, and restore Alcamoth...Right? 'Melia:' Haha... Exactly right. Shall we?
